headings.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-light tracking-tight text-white leading-tight
headings.h2: text-3xl md:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-light tracking-tight text-[#0F2742]

typography.accent: uppercase text-xs md:text-sm tracking-[0.2em] text-[#B38B45] font-medium

layouts.nav: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 transition-all duration-300
layouts.hero: relative h-screen w-full flex flex-col justify-center items-center text-center px-4
layouts.grid_criteria: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6
layouts.about_section: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-12 lg:gap-24 items-center

hero.instructions: Full viewport height (`min-h-screen`). Use the exact video URL for the background `<video autoPlay loop muted playsInline>` with `object-cover`. Overlay with `bg-[#0F2742]/60` or `bg-black/50`. Vertically center headline ('Creating Value Through Commercial Real Estate') and subhead. NO call-to-action buttons. Add a subtle thin vertical line animating down at the bottom center for scroll indication.

navbar.instructions: At the very top, text should be white and background transparent. Upon scrolling past 50px, transition to `bg-white` with `text-[#0F2742]` and a subtle `border-b border-[#E5E7EB]`. Logo on left. Navigation items (`About`, `Our Mission`, `Investment Criteria`, `Portfolio`, `Contact`) on right. MUST ensure high contrast at all times.

criteria_card.instructions: Render the 11 investment criteria in extremely clean, minimalistic cards. `bg-white`, thin border `border-[#30343B]/10`, padding `p-6 md:p-8`. Hover effect: subtle lift (`-translate-y-1`) and `shadow-lg`. Use sharp corners (`rounded-none` or `rounded-sm`) to maintain an institutional aesthetic. Optionally, add a 2px top border of `#B38B45` on hover.

about_section.instructions: Left side (col-span-5): Founder photo of Paul Skapets (use user-attached photo or a fallback placeholder), aspect ratio 3:4. Right side (col-span-7): Story text using generous `leading-relaxed` typography. Emphasize construction, manufacturing, and strong partnerships.

mission_banner.instructions: Full width, deep navy `bg-[#0F2742]`. Text pure white. Accent gold `#B38B45`. Minimalist and elegant block emphasizing 'Value First'. Large typography for the core message.

portfolio_item.instructions: Two large neutral gray placeholders `bg-[#E5E7EB]` to represent projects (NO stock imagery). Aspect ratio 16:9 or 4:3. Below placeholder: H3 title in `#0F2742` and brief subtext in `#30343B`.

contact_block.instructions: Centered, text-based block using large typography. Phone, Email, Location displayed elegantly. Static information only—NO form elements.

footer.instructions: Minimal, elegant. Company name, copyright, and 'Commercial Real Estate Investments'. Background white or `#0F2742`, text matching contrast.

motion.scroll_animations: Implement smooth scrolling (if possible with pure React, otherwise standard CSS scroll-behavior: smooth). Use framer-motion `whileInView` for subtle fade-in and slide-up (y: 30) when sections enter the viewport.
motion.hover_effects: Transitions should use `ease-out duration-300`. Lift elements slightly rather than aggressive scaling.

instructions_to_main_agent: You MUST write `.js` or `.jsx` files. DO NOT output `.tsx` files as the environment uses JavaScript.
Adhere strictly to the color palette: #0F2742 (navy), #30343B (charcoal), #B38B45 (gold), and white. Do not invent new colors.
Use Inter font globally. Despite its standard appearance, use `font-light` and `tracking-tight` on large headings to create a sophisticated, high-end institutional look.
Ensure the hero background video works properly and is covered by a dark overlay for text legibility.
Do not add any call-to-action buttons in the hero.
Order of sections must be: Hero -> Investment Criteria -> About -> Mission -> Portfolio -> Contact.

Assume user attached files are available. For images like the logo and founder photo, structure image tags to load them ideally from `/logo.png` or `/founder.jpg`. If missing, the `` and context will handle it.
DO NOT use a transparent background for the navbar when the user scrolls past the hero. It must have a solid background to prevent text overlap.
Add `data-testid` to all major sections, links, cards, and text elements to ensure test coverage.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not use generic centered layouts. Use structured grid systems (like 12-column) for content sections.
Create depth through subtle layered design elements and refined typography rather than heavy shadows or gradients.
Never apply universal transition (`transition: all`). Use specific properties (`transition-colors`, `transition-transform`).
Keep spacing generous (`py-24`, `px-6`) to create visual breathing room.
Do not add generic icons like 🤖🧠💭. Use sleek SVG icons from `lucide-react` only when functionally necessary (e.g., down arrow for scroll indicator).
